findings.description: The sort implementation JSP in the source uses `usePageNumberSubmit="true"` and `useLastSubmit="true"` on the `nbs:listSearchResult` tag, which do not appear in the basic paging JSP (s1). These attributes represent a difference in the sort implementation but are not mentioned in the knowledge file's s3 section or hints.
findings.source_evidence: <nbs:listSearchResult ... usePageNumberSubmit="true" useLastSubmit="true"> in the sort JSP example

findings.description: Several PascalCase class names from the action implementation code example are absent from s1 hints: `MessageUtil`, `MessageLevel`, `SqlResultSet`, `ValidationContext`.
findings.source_evidence: Source action code: ValidationContext<W11AC01SearchForm> searchConditionCtx = ...; SqlResultSet searchResult; MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, ...)

findings.description: `TooManyResultException` appears in the no-paging action code example (inside a catch block) but is absent from s4 hints. `SqlResultSet` and `ValidationContext` are also referenced in the s4 action code but missing from hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source s4 action code: SqlResultSet searchResult; ValidationContext<W11AC01SearchForm> searchConditionCtx = ...; catch (TooManyResultException e) { // дЊЛе§ЦеЗ¶зРЖгБѓзЬБзХ•гАВ }
